title: Missing collision detection in callback RX path
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py:781

## Description
When _get_rx_result_internal returns None (no successful reception), it does not check if len(candidates) >= 2 to record collisions like get_rx_result does at lines 847-864. Collisions that occur during callback-based RX mode are silently dropped and never recorded in self._metrics.record_collision() or logged.

## Failure Scenario
Two nodes A and B transmit simultaneously. Node C receives via enter_rx_mode/deliver_pending_packets. Both signals collide at C (resolve_reception returns None with 2 candidates). The collision is NOT recorded: simulation.metrics.collisions stays 0, collision_rate stays 0.0, no 'collision' log entry is written. Test suite relying on collision metrics will pass incorrectly.

## Category
correctness
